scripts.dev: bun run dev:web & bun run dev:api
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && PYTHONPATH=src:../../packages/config/src uv run uvicorn affine.api.server:app --reload --port 9000
scripts.build:api: cd apps/api && PYTHONPATH=src:../../packages/config/src uv run python -m compileall src
scripts.typecheck: cd apps/web && bun run typecheck && cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=src:../../packages/config/src uv run pyrefly check
scripts.lint: cd apps/web && bun run lint && cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=src:../../packages/config/src uv run ruff check
scripts.format: cd apps/web && bun run format && cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=src:../../packages/config/src uv run ruff format
scripts.test: cd apps/web && bun run test && cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=src:../../packages/config/src uv run pytest
